Command.name: alert
Command.title: Show Alert
Command.Description: Prints a Bootstrap alert into the conversational interface.

Parameter.name: text
Parameter.description: Message text shown inside the alert.

Parameter.name: color
Parameter.description: Bootstrap semantic color: primary, secondary, success, danger, warning, info, light, dark.

Command.Improve: Prefer strengthening this command with optional icon, title, dismissible, or markdown settings rather than creating narrow commands such as success-alert or error-alert.
